choices.text: Topics (pub/sub, async, one-to-many), services (RPC request/response sync), actions (long-running with feedback). Pick based on use case: streaming data → topic, query → service, navigation goal → action.
Check QoS. Sensor data → BEST_EFFORT (UDP-like, high rate, lossy OK). Commands → RELIABLE (TCP-like, every message matters). Subscriber QoS must match publisher's; mismatch = no messages received.
